creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 171633
Proposed patch (since 409338 revision)

Removed EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS define, because this is not necessary (some .gitignore files exists in osx sub-directories, but they are not used for installation).

- Remove EXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS define
- Add desktop-file-utils to USES
- Install available treesheets.desktop file
